_comment: LEONTEQ universe members deliberately left untradeable after the IBKR findability sweep + candidate inspection (2026-06-16). Each has no safe, tradeable IBKR contract for the same company. company_id -> reason.

5021.name: Arcadium Lithium PLC
5021.reason: acquired by Rio Tinto (2025); delisted, no IBKR venue

5629.name: iRobot Corp
5629.reason: distressed (IRBTQ bankruptcy marker); no live IBKR venue

5275.name: Foot Locker Inc
5275.reason: acquired by Dick's Sporting Goods (2025); IBKR VALUE/MEXI only

5571.name: Skechers USA Inc
5571.reason: taken private (3G Capital, 2025); IBKR VALUE + thin German only

5542.name: Toyota Industries Corp
5542.reason: take-private by Toyota (2025-26); only thin FWB2 line, TSEJ not surfaced

4191.name: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd
4191.reason: WRONG ISIN in bbterminal (BMG455841020 resolves to HAL Trust / Halliburton); NSE India not directly tradeable

4392.name: LTIMindtree Ltd
4392.reason: WRONG ISIN in bbterminal (US51817R2058 = LATAM Airlines ADR); wrong-company trap

4754.name: SM Investments Corp
4754.reason: WRONG ISIN in bbterminal (US78454L1008 = SM Energy Co); wrong-company trap

5278.name: Hologic Inc
5278.reason: take-private (Blackstone/TPG, Dec 2025); no live US listing on IBKR

5274.name: Exact Sciences Corp
5274.reason: RECHECK: no live US listing surfaced on IBKR secdef (ISIN + ticker both VALUE-only)

5176.name: Confluent Inc
5176.reason: RECHECK: no live US (NASDAQ) listing surfaced on IBKR secdef (only MEXI/VALUE)
